title: calea yariguiensis
intro: Calea yariguiensis, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to Mexico and is also known as Yarigui or Mexican Daisy. The medicinal properties of Calea yariguiensis include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its chemical compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming Calea yariguiensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving sleep quality, as well as its potential use in treating anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Calea yariguiensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal benefits.
